content_body: There were 4 generations of our family here for the week and we were blessed with some beautiful leaf colors by the end of the week. I am thankful for the wonderful times that we had with our grandchildren and for the memories I hope we made with them. Life is always too short and the times we spend with our family even shorter. We are blessed and thankful to God for our health and ability to enjoy such a beautiful place.
title: Memorable Family Reunion in the Blue Ridge Mountains
